description: ExchangeRate-API provides currency exchange rate and conversion data for many world currencies. It offers free, open-access, and paid plans with endpoints for latest rates, pair conversion, and some higher-tier historical or enriched responses.
summary: ExchangeRate-API exposes three public developer HTTP surfaces: a key-authenticated v6 REST API, a no-key Open Access REST endpoint, and a legacy/public v4 REST API documented by an OpenAPI spec; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaced.
